base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_full_poseset — a character (playable) from 1994 super metroid. Samus — Power Suit + Varia + Gravity suits × run/jump/morph-ball/spring-ball/spin-jump/screw-attack/wall-jump/shinespark/crystal-flash/grapple-swing/charge-beam. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Samus — Power Suit + Varia + Gravity suits × run/jump/morph-ball/spring-ball/spin-jump/screw-attack/wall-jump/shinespark/crystal-flash/grapple-swing/charge-beam
